ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detectors" (
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detector */,
  "detector_name" TEXT /* Name of the detector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detector */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the detector is used in */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of detector */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the detector */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the detector */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the detector was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the detector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detectors_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "particles" (
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each particle */,
  "particle_name" TEXT /* Name of the particle */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the particle */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge of the particle */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the particle was detected in */,
  "spin" REAL /* Spin of the particle */,
  "lifetime" REAL /* Lifetime of the particle */,
  "decay_modes" TEXT /* Decay modes of the particle */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the particle is stable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("particle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_particles_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collisions" (
  "collision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collision */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the collision occurred in */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector that detected the collision */,
  "collision_energy" REAL /* Energy of the collision */,
  "collision_time" TEXT /* Time of the collision */,
  "collision_type" TEXT /* Type of collision */,
  "beam_energy" REAL /* Energy of the beam used in the collision */,
  "beam_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the beam used in the collision */,
  "collision_outcome" TEXT /* Description of the outcome of the collision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collisions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle that left the track */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector that detected the track */,
  "track_energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "track_time" TEXT /* Time of the track */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track */,
  "track_curvature" REAL /* Curvature of the track */,
  "track_momentum" REAL /* Momentum of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_detector_id FOREIGN KEY ("detector_id") REFERENCES detectors ("detector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_particle_id FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hits" (
  "hit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hit */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that the hit belongs to */,
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detector that detected the hit */,
  "hit_energy" REAL /* Energy of the hit */,
  "hit_time" TEXT /* Time of the hit */,
  "hit_type" TEXT /* Type of hit */,
  "hit_position" TEXT /* Position of the hit in the detector */,
  "hit_resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the hit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hits_detector_id FOREIGN KEY ("detector_id") REFERENCES detectors ("detector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hits_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isoScores" (
  "isoScore_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isolation score */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle */,
  "isoScore" REAL /* Isolation score of the particle */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the isolation score */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the isolation score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isoScore_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isoScores_particle_id FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "CDF" (
  "CDF_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CDF value */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle */,
  "CDF1" REAL /* CDF1 value */,
  "CDF2" REAL /* CDF2 value */,
  "CDF3" REAL /* CDF3 value */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the CDF values */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the CDF values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("CDF_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_CDF_particle_id FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ISO_SumBDT" (
  "ISO_SumBDT_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISO Sum BDT value */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle */,
  "ISO_SumBDT" REAL /* ISO Sum BDT value */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the ISO Sum BDT value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the ISO Sum BDT value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ISO_SumBDT_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ISO_SumBDT_particle_id FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "p_IsoBDT" (
  "p_IsoBDT_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each p Iso BDT value */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle */,
  "p0_IsoBDT" REAL /* p0 Iso BDT value */,
  "p1_IsoBDT" REAL /* p1 Iso BDT value */,
  "p2_IsoBDT" REAL /* p2 Iso BDT value */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the p Iso BDT values */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the p Iso BDT values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_IsoBDT_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_IsoBDT_particle_id FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_Chi2Dof" (
  "track_Chi2Dof_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track Chi2Dof value */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle */,
  "p0_track_Chi2Dof" REAL /* p0 track Chi2Dof value */,
  "p1_track_Chi2Dof" REAL /* p1 track Chi2Dof value */,
  "p2_track_Chi2Dof" REAL /* p2 track Chi2Dof value */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the track Chi2Dof values */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the track Chi2Dof values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_Chi2Dof_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_Chi2Dof_particle_id FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "p_IP" (
  "p_IP_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each p IP value */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle */,
  "p0_IP" REAL /* p0 IP value */,
  "p1_IP" REAL /* p1 IP value */,
  "p2_IP" REAL /* p2 IP value */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the p IP values */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the p IP values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_IP_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_IP_particle_id FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "p_IPSig" (
  "p_IPSig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each p IPSig value */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle */,
  "p0_IPSig" REAL /* p0 IPSig value */,
  "p1_IPSig" REAL /* p1 IPSig value */,
  "p2_IPSig" REAL /* p2 IPSig value */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the p IPSig values */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the p IPSig values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_IPSig_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_p_IPSig_particle_id FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id")
)
